events.appearance_notes: Observed event; A man in pink pants walked by.
events.event_text: From 2.3s to 5.5s, a man in pink pants walked by.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; A black car was hit by a white car while passing through the alley, and a woman was also knocked to the ground.
events.event_text: From 7.3s to 13.5s, a black car was hit by a white car while passing through the alley, and a woman was also knocked to the ground.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; The white car reversed and a group of people on the road held the car and held down the driver.
events.event_text: From 13.5s to 17.3s, the white car reversed and a group of people on the road held the car and held down the driver.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; Another group of passers-by moved the black car that was pressing on the woman who was hit and rescued the woman.
events.event_text: From 17.3s to 27.5s, another group of passers-by moved the black car that was pressing on the woman who was hit and rescued the woman.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; A group of people took the woman who was hit away, and the people in the black car climbed in the car and talked to a group of people in the car.
events.event_text: From 28.3s to 43.6s, a group of people took the woman who was hit away, and the people in the black car climbed in the car and talked to a group of people in the car.

events.appearance_notes: High activity; A group of people lifted the overturned car and then went to the white car.
events.event_text: From 43.6s to 58.8s, a group of people lifted the overturned car and then went to the white car.
